name: Mashed Winter Squash
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Cut each squash into lengthwise quarters; scoop out seeds and discard. Score the yellow meaty part of each quarter with a knife. Brush the bottom of a shallow baking pan with the vegetable oil. Place squash pieces in the pan, cut side down. Bake until tender, about 45-50 minutes. Remove skin from squash and put pulp into a bowl; beat until fluffy. Add margarine and beat it in well. If desired, garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH EXCHANGE
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent.
